data.body: Investigation (cluster B, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #16 Instruction Locality + #8 Recency Dominance. ROOT_CAUSE: reviewer-base.md has internal self-contradiction — Step 1 line 59 sets `REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)` (concrete bash binding), Step 2 line 70 says "do NOT re-derive REPO_ROOT" (abstract prose). Concrete executable code in Step 1 wins over abstract warning in Step 2. Step 3 repeats the same contradictory derivation at line 244. PROPOSED_FIXES: (a) Step 1: replace `REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse ...)` with `cd "$REPO_ROOT"` (REPO_ROOT from dispatch prompt); add inline comment "REPO_ROOT is provided in your dispatch prompt — do NOT re-derive via git rev-parse". (b) Step 3: remove duplicate `REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse ...)` line. (c) Run build-review-agents.sh to regenerate all 10 code-reviewer-*.md files. Confidence: high. Minimal-fix applied: true.
